description: User selects March 22nd as the return date in the calendar picker
frame_description: The user clicks on the 22nd of March in the date picker modal, which then highlights in purple.

description: User clicks the 'Done' button to confirm date selection
frame_description: The user clicks the purple 'Done' button at the bottom right of the calendar modal.
The user clicks the 'Search Flights' button in the main search widget.

description: Page navigates to flight search results and begins loading
frame_description: The browser navigates to the flight search results page, showing a loading animation and flight path.
